name: subject-not-string-throws
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :EndsWithSubjectNotString
  :message "endsWith expects String at position 1, got number"
  :operand "endsWith"
  :position 1
  :expectedType "String"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step ~{endsWith("x")} :input 42}
  :trail null
}

name: suffix-not-string-throws
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :EndsWithSuffixNotString
  :message "endsWith expects String at position 2, got number"
  :operand "endsWith"
  :position 2
  :expectedType "String"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step ~{endsWith(42)} :input "hi"}
  :trail null
}
